questions.question: Given the following statements: p -> q and p, deduce which of the following conclusions can be logically inferred?
questions.hint: Use the rules of inference to justify your answer

questions.question: If 'If it is raining, then the roads are wet' and 'The roads are wet', what can be logically inferred about the statement 'It is raining'?
questions.hint: Use the rules of inference to justify your answer

questions.question: Consider the following statements: p -> (q -> r) and p. What can be logically inferred about the statement q?
questions.hint: Use the rules of inference to justify your answer
